description: The Clan Cappello is a Mafia organization and family originating from the province of Catania, Sicily, named after boss Salvatore Cappello. It is considered, together with the Catania family of Nitto Santapaola, the most powerful Mafia clan in eastern Sicily. The clan emerged from the earlier Ferlito-Pillera group and rose to prominence in the 1980s under Salvatore Cappello.
